amplifyuibuilder.form.sectionalelement.C: The `SectionalElement` property specifies the configuration information for a visual helper element for a form. A sectional element can be a header, a text block, or a divider. These elements are static and not associated with any data.

amplifyuibuilder.form.sectionalelement.E.Description: Excludes a sectional element that was generated by default for a specified data model.

amplifyuibuilder.form.sectionalelement.L.Description: Specifies the size of the font for a `Heading` sectional element. Valid values are `1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6`.

amplifyuibuilder.form.sectionalelement.O.Description: Specifies the orientation for a `Divider` sectional element. Valid values are `horizontal` or `vertical`.

amplifyuibuilder.form.sectionalelement.P.Description: Specifies the position of the text in a field for a `Text` sectional element.

amplifyuibuilder.form.sectionalelement.T.Description: The text for a `Text` sectional element.
The type of sectional element. Valid values are `Heading`, `Text`, and `Divider`.
